name: Earners Levy
description: ACC Earners' Levy rates and maximum liable income limits

raw.description: ACC Earners' Levy rates and maximum liable income limits

name: Minimum Age Threshold
description: Minimum age of a person for a minister to authorize citizenship by grant

name: Minimum Days Present For Each Of Preceeding 5 Years
description: minimum of days present in New Zealand for each of the 5 years immediately preceding the date of the application

name: Minimum Days Present In Preceeding 5 Years
description: minimum of days present in New Zealand during the 5 years immediately preceding the date of the application

name: Income Limits
description: Schedule 5 - Part 3 - Disability allowance income limits

raw.description: Schedule 5 - Part 3 - Disability allowance income limits

name: Principal Caregiver Minimum Exclusive Care Percentage
description: Minimum percentage of exclusive care of a dependent child time that defines a principal caregiver

name: Additional Per Dependant
reference: Obtained from spreadsheet at Department Of Internal Affairs Innovation Lab

name: Income Threshold
reference: Obtained from spreadsheet at Department Of Internal Affairs Innovation Lab

name: Initial Contribution
reference: Obtained from spreadsheet at Department Of Internal Affairs Innovation Lab

name: Maximum Allowable
reference: Obtained from spreadsheet at Department Of Internal Affairs Innovation Lab

name: Age Threshold
description: Minimum age to recieve Community Services Card (without a dependent child)

name: Hours Per Week Threshold
description: Hours worked per week to qualify as a full time earner for purposes of the Family Scheme

name: Hours Per Week Threshold With Partner
description: Hours worked per week to qualify as a full time earner for purposes of the Family Scheme (with a partner)

name: Age Threshold Other
description: Minimum age to recieve Jobseeker Support (in any other case)

name: Age Threshold Without Dependent Child
description: Minimum age to recieve Jobseeker Support (without a dependent child)

name: Age Threshold
description: Minimum age to recieve Sole Parent Support

name: Minumum Continuous Time In Nz
description: Minimum time (in years), at one time, in NZ since becoming citizen or permanent resident

name: Youngest Child Age Threshold
description: Maximum age of youngest child, for parent to recieve Sole Parent Support

name: Age Threshold
description: Minimum age to recieve Supported Living Payment

name: Weekly Income Threshold
description: the amount that would, in accordance with sections MD 1 and MD 13 of that Act, fully abate the amount of the parent or guardian concerned’s family tax credit entitlement under that Act.

name: Age Qualification
description: Age qualification for New Zealand superannuation

name: Age Threshold
description: Minimum age to recieve accommodation supplement

name: Assets
description: Social Security Regulations 2018 - 5   Accommodation Supplement - 15  Assets requirement -

raw.description: Social Security Regulations 2018 - 5   Accommodation Supplement - 15  Assets requirement -

name: Board Lodger Percent
description: 62% of the amount paid for board or lodging

name: Cutout
description: Social Security Act 2018 - 423 Regulations: accommodation supplement - Schedule 4: Rates of benefits - Part 7: Accommodation supplement

raw.description: Social Security Act 2018 - 423 Regulations: accommodation supplement - Schedule 4: Rates of benefits - Part 7: Accommodation supplement

section_1.description: To a person who has 1 or more dependent children and who is in a relationship, or a sole parent with 2 or more dependent children, whose accommodation costs are rent or payments for board and lodgings.

section_2.description: To a person who has no dependent children and who is in a relationship, or a sole parent with 1 dependent child, whose accommodation costs are rent or payments for board and lodgings.

section_3.description: To any other person whose accommodation costs are rent or payments for board and lodgings.

section_4.description: To a person who has 1 or more dependent children and who is in a relationship, or a sole parent with 2 or more dependent children, whose accommodation costs are the sum of payments required under any mortgage security, and other payments that the chief executive is satisfied are reasonably required to be made in respect of the person’s home.

section_5.description: To a person who has no dependent children and who is in a relationship, or a sole parent with 1 dependent child, whose accommodation costs are the sum of payments required under any mortgage security, and other payments that the chief executive is satisfied are reasonably required to be made in respect of the person’s home.

section_6.description: To any other person whose accommodation costs are the sum of payments required under any mortgage security, and other payments that the chief executive is satisfied are reasonably required to be made in respect of the person’s home.

name: Rebate
description: Social Security Act 2018 - 423 Regulations: accommodation supplement - Schedule 4: Rates of benefits - Part 7: Accommodation supplement

raw.description: Social Security Act 2018 - 423 Regulations: accommodation supplement - Schedule 4: Rates of benefits - Part 7: Accommodation supplement

section_2.description: To a person who has no dependent children and who is in a relationship, or a sole parent with 1 dependent child, whose accommodation costs are rent or payments for board and lodgings.
